creator: vlad.shabanov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kevin Bowling from comment #24)
I still able to reproduce the hung manually invoking
$ sudo ifconfig igb0 -vlanhwtso
or 
$ sudo ifconfig igb0 vlanhwtso

It hungs and the watchdog does ifconfig down/up to recover. Maybe, you need sysctl dumps before/after this command?

Certainly, I am not sure thah this hung and the spontateous one have the same origin.
